name: personal-os
description: Marc Stiller's Personal Operating System — a small, durable arrangement of System Agents, Specialists, and shared memory operating on the Principal's behalf within explicit constitutional limits. Stage 1 ships Knowledge Steward (memory ownership) and Chief of Staff (orchestration); Specialists, Comms, Researcher, and Challenger arrive in later stages on evidence. Per the Stage 0 constitution at /os/stage-0-constitution-and-architecture.md.
